prompt: I need to add a small fishing boat that the player can pilot across the ocean on our water planet. The boat should bob realistically on the waves, feel heavy when turning, and slow down properly when the player stops accelerating. Create the ECS components and systems for this — the planet already has a WaterBodyComponent on it with some basic wave params.
assertions: Creates a HullComponent with at least 8 BuoyancySamplePoints distributed across the hull
BuoyancySystem transforms sample points to world space and queries wave height using galaxy-space coordinates
Buoyancy force direction uses hull normal (not just world-up) to produce natural restoring torques
HydrodynamicDragSystem subtracts water current velocity before computing drag
Drag is quadratic in speed (uses v² term)
All forces applied via btRigidBody.applyCentralForce/applyTorque, not direct velocity manipulation
Uses Pools.obtain/free for temporary Vector3 objects
Does not hardcode water density — reads from WaterBodyComponent
